R Notebook

library(MatchIt)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(plm)
library(fixest)
library(zoo)
library(did)
library(lubridate)
library(googledrive)
library(ggplot2)
library(arrow)
library(stargazer)
library(lmtest)
df = read_parquet('../data/working_data_with_disability_common.parquet')
df
model1 <- feols(
    net_job ~ is_employed_has_disablity | idind + year,
    cluster = ~idind,
    data = df
)
print(summary(model1))
OLS estimation, Dep. Var.: net_job
Observations: 4,772
Fixed-effects: idind: 2,386,  year: 2
Standard-errors: Clustered (idind) 
                          Estimate Std. Error t value   Pr(>|t|)    
is_employed_has_disablity  16715.6    4700.46 3.55615 0.00038365 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
RMSE: 10,773.2     Adj. R2: 0.625033
                 Within R2: 0.00477 
print(confint(model1, level = 0.95))
                             2.5 %   97.5 %
is_employed_has_disablity 7498.146 25932.98
model2 <- feols(
    log(net_job + 1) ~ is_employed_has_disablity | idind + year,
    cluster = ~idind,
    data = df
)
print(summary(model2))
OLS estimation, Dep. Var.: log(net_job + 1)
Observations: 4,772
Fixed-effects: idind: 2,386,  year: 2
Standard-errors: Clustered (idind) 
                          Estimate Std. Error t value   Pr(>|t|)    
is_employed_has_disablity  5.02439    1.14847 4.37487 1.2673e-05 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
RMSE: 1.60339     Adj. R2: 0.34084 
                Within R2: 0.019173
print(confint(model2, level = 0.95))
                             2.5 %   97.5 %
is_employed_has_disablity 2.772298 7.276487
